---
applyTo: "src/routes/**"
description: TanStack Start file-based routing for Mizizi
---

# TanStack Start routes

- One route per file. `index.tsx` → `/`, `app.tsx` → `/app` layout with `<Outlet />`.
- App children: `app.farmers.tsx` → `/app/farmers`. Dynamic: bare `$` segments.
- Do not create `src/pages/` or edit `routeTree.gen.ts` (auto-generated).
- See `src/routes/README.md`.
